description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a cartoon rabbit, featuring a rounded orange body with large, upright ears and oversized, circular white eyes with black pupils. The toy has a small, black nose and a simple, stitched mouth, giving it a playful and friendly appearance. Its limbs are short and rounded, with lighter beige accents on the hands and feet. A prominent, shiny purple bow tie is attached to its neck, adding a touch of character and color contrast. The back of the toy is plain, with no additional features or markings. The overall surface appears soft and slightly shiny, typical of synthetic plush materials.
description: A soft, orange cartoon rabbit stuffed toy with large eyes, a purple bow tie, and beige accents on its hands and feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rabbit's face, large eyes, black nose, stitched mouth, and prominent purple bow tie.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, upright ear, and the rounded body with visible bow tie.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain orange surface, rounded body, and beige accents on the back of the arms.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the head, ear, and body with the bow tie partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a small, simple mouth. The lack of eyebrows and the round pupils give it a cheerful, innocent look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms and legs slightly spread, head facing forward and ears pointing upward.
